rules.name: SalesforceObj4f79ac97c786dbc466d14348941ab664
rules.conditionLogic: ( ( ( ( (1 AND 2) AND 3) AND 4) AND (5 OR 6) ) AND ( ( (7 OR 8) OR 9) OR 10) )
rules.label: SalesforceObj4f79ac97c786dbc466d14348941ab664

rules.name: State_Change_SalesforceObj4f79ac97c786dbc466d14348941ab664
rules.conditionLogic: NOT ( ( ( ( (1 AND 2) AND 3) AND 4) AND (5 OR 6) ) AND ( ( (7 OR 8) OR 9) OR 10) )
rules.label: State_Change_SalesforceObj4f79ac97c786dbc466d14348941ab664

rules.name: SalesforceObj638c2997a496109d19249624baecff9d
